text: Touleen, Majdal Zoun, Byout al-Seyyed
text_zh: 图林，马杰达勒宗，拜特赛义德

text: 📝 Разрешать тоже нужно 📝 И почему призывы к запретам сменись их критикой На Совете законодателей президент России озвучил то, что для кого-то точно стало медом для ушей: закцикливаться на запретах и ограничениях контрпродуктивно, а излишние барьеры тормозят развитие. Причины очевидны: волна недовольства в связи с ограничением работы Telegram и борьба с VPN создали у общественности ощущение того, что государство резко свернуло в сторону тотальной запретомании. Но есть и любопытный момент. При взгляде на инициативы последних лет можно заметить, что 2026 год в плане объема новых законодательных ограничений пока не очень-то и выделяется. А иные акты еще вчера массы не просто приветствовали, но и даже критиковали власти за недостаточную «отмену» разных лиц-организаций. 🖍 Так что явления (по сути) остались те же, зато изменилось их восприятие. Из-за фона в виде экономических проблем и топорной реализации у людей и создалось впечатление того, что всё везде резко стало плохо, и вообще вокруг одно запретунство. 🚩 Что с этим делать? Например, последовать словам главы государства и не только запрещать, но также упрощать и разрешать какие-то осязаемые населением вещи. Аналогично и с персоналиями — не только «отменять», но и разрешать . ❗️ В таком случае некоторые новые ограничения (в т.ч. реально обоснованные) будут восприниматься менее остро и более взвешенно. Да и пар общественного недовольства это тоже позволит отчасти сбросить. Если же запустить ситуацию, то люди все чаще будут проводить параллели с советским «застоем», а то и вовсе 1914-1917. И неважно, насколько это далеко от действительности: ведь восприятие реальности порой задвигает саму реальность. #Россия ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ ОК | ✉️ Дзен 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh: 📝 也需要允许 📝 为什么呼吁禁止的声音被批评所取代？在立法者委员会上，俄罗斯总统说出了一些对某些人来说绝对是顺耳的话：沉迷于禁令和限制是适得其反的，过多的障碍会阻碍发展。原因显而易见：与限制 Telegram 使用和打击 VPN 有关的不满浪潮，让公众产生了一种国家正急剧转向全面“禁令狂热”的感觉。但也有一个有趣的现象。纵观近几年的倡议，可以发现 2026 年在新的立法限制数量方面并没有特别突出。而有些法案在昨天之前，大众不仅表示欢迎，甚至还批评当局对各种个人和组织“取消”得不够。 🖍 所以现象（本质上）依然存在，但人们的看法改变了。由于经济问题和执行粗糙的背景，人们产生了一种到处都突然变糟的印象，周围全是禁令。 🚩 该怎么办？例如，遵循国家元首的话，不仅要禁止，还要简化和允许一些民众能感受到的事情。对于个人也是如此——不仅要“取消”，还要“允许”。 ❗️ 这样一来，一些新的限制（包括真正合理的限制）会被感知得不那么尖锐，也会更理智。这也将有助于部分释放公众不满的情绪。如果任由局势发展，人们会越来越频繁地将其与苏联的“停滞期”相提并论，甚至联想到 1914-1917 年。无论这与现实相差多远：毕竟对现实的感知有时会掩盖现实本身。 #俄罗斯 ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ OK | ✉️ Dzen 💸 支持我们

text: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇺🇲 According to Axios, Trump told advisers that "Iranian leaders only understand the language of bombs"... The U.S. president is consulting with "hawks" (radical individuals) outside the administration, who unanimously advise him to take "some kind of military action to get out of the current deadlock" regarding Iran. tweet

text: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Axios writes that the conflict with Iran increasingly resembles a Cold War-style confrontation — instead of large-scale combat operations, sanctions, maritime pressure, and prolonged diplomacy dominate. US President Trump and his advisers are not agreed on the next steps — some support continuing economic pressure, while others favor resuming military actions. Several US officials fear the country could get stuck in a long, frozen conflict. Such a scenario poses a serious problem for the Trump administration, especially with the upcoming November midterm elections and rising energy prices due to the conflict. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Axios 写道，与伊朗的冲突越来越像冷战式的对抗——没有大规模的战斗行动，而是以制裁、海上压力和长期外交为主。美国总统特朗普及其顾问在下一步行动上尚未达成一致——一些人支持继续施加经济压力，而另一些人则倾向于恢复军事行动。几位美国官员担心该国可能会陷入一场漫长的、冻结的冲突。这种情况对特朗普政府构成了严重问题，特别是在即将到来的 11 月中期选举和因冲突导致的能源价格上涨的情况下。推文

text: WarTranslated According to monitoring channels, Russian mercenaries have been surrounded after retreating from the city of Kidal in Mali. In Kidal, where the Russian base was located, rebels captured a control station for Bayraktar TB2 drones, which Mali had purchased under the previous pro-Western government. tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 据监测频道称，俄罗斯雇佣兵在从马里基达尔市撤退后被包围。在俄罗斯基地所在的基达尔，叛军缴获了一个 Bayraktar TB2 无人机控制站，这是马里在前亲西方政府时期购买的。推文

Following checks, no weapons were found, and the school later issued a statement addressing the incident. @wfwitness

text: NEW: Poland and Belarus just swapped prisoners, 5 for 5. Both sides exchanged 5 prisoners each at the border. Belarus released 3 Poles (including journalist Andrzej Poczobut) and 2 Moldovans. Poland returned 5 Belarusians, reportedly linked to intelligence activities. The deal was partly facilitated with US involvement.
text_zh: 最新：波兰和白俄罗斯刚刚交换了囚犯，5 对 5。双方在边境各交换了 5 名囚犯。白俄罗斯释放了 3 名波兰人（包括记者安德烈·波乔布特）和 2 名摩尔多瓦人。波兰归还了 5 名据称与情报活动有关的白俄罗斯人。该协议是在美国部分参与下促成的。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Footage shows IDF demolitions destroying a neighborhood in the village of Al-Khiam and the Bint Jbeil stadium where former Hezbollah Secretary General Hassan Nasrallah delivered his infamous "spider web" speech in 2000. @wfwitness

I call on everyone to continue with their routine, be patient…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 i24NEWS: According to a confidential discussion, IDF officers have updated that Iran is managing to partially restore its ballistic missile array. No comment from the IDF has been issued. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇮🇷 以色列议会外交与国防委员会主席博阿兹·比斯穆特在安全简报结束时表示：伊朗政权即将付出非常沉重的代价。我呼吁大家继续日常工作，保持耐心……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 i24NEWS：根据机密讨论，以色列国防军军官更新称，伊朗正在设法部分恢复其弹道导弹阵列。以色列国防军尚未发表评论。 @wfwitness

text: NEW: Russia claims a coup attempt in Mali was stopped. Russia’s Defense Ministry says its “African Corps” helped stop a large-scale attack on April 25. Around 12,000 fighters reportedly hit four major cities, including the capital. Russia claims ~2,500 attackers were killed. It also alleges the fighters were trained by Ukrainian and European instructors.
text_zh: 最新消息：俄罗斯声称马里的一场政变企图已被挫败。俄罗斯国防部表示，其“非洲军团”协助阻止了4月25日发生的大规模袭击。据报道，约1.2万名武装人员袭击了包括首都在内的四个主要城市。俄罗斯声称约2500名袭击者被击毙。俄方还指控这些武装人员是由乌克兰和欧洲教官训练的。

text: Argentina’s Vice President Victoria Villarruel says Falkland Islanders who feel British to “go back to England”: The Kelpers are English people who live in Argentine territory; they are not part of the discussion. If they feel English, they should go back to the thousands of miles away where their country is. Today, more than ever, the Malvinas are Argentine.
text_zh: 阿根廷副总统维多利亚·维拉鲁埃尔表示，感觉自己是英国人的福克兰群岛居民应该“回英国去”：凯尔珀人（Kelpers）是居住在阿根廷领土上的英国人；他们不属于讨论范畴。如果他们觉得自己是英国人，就应该回到几千英里外他们的国家去。今天，马尔维纳斯群岛比以往任何时候都更属于阿根廷。

text: 🇷🇺 👨‍🦲 Key takeaways from statements by Kremlin Press Secretary Dmitry Peskov, April 28: ➡️ Russian President Vladimir Putin condemns all forms of violence and attacks on world leaders, Peskov said, commenting on the attempt on Trump’s life ➡️ The Kremlin does not comment on the Ukraine-Israel grain dispute : “ Let the Kiev regime sort it out with Israel, and Israel – with the Kiev regime” ➡️ Measures to eliminate the consequences of the UAV attack on Tuapse are being taken at an appropriate level ➡️ Putin will hold a meeting on security arrangements for the upcoming elections ➡️ The Kremlin will report on a Putin – Trump call if it takes place ➡️ Intensive efforts are underway to prevent strikes by the Kiev regime on Russian territory ➡️ Any information about strike impact locations is classified and will not be disclosed publicly ➡️ Russia considers it important for the situation in Mali to return to a peaceful and stable course as soon as possible ➡️ Victory Day parade on May 9 will take place as planned 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 👨‍🦲 克里姆林宫新闻秘书德米特里·佩斯科夫4月28日声明的主要内容：➡️ 佩斯科夫在评论针对特朗普的暗杀企图时表示，俄罗斯总统弗拉基米尔·普京谴责一切形式的针对世界领导人的暴力和袭击 ➡️ 克里姆林宫不对乌克兰与以色列之间的粮食纠纷发表评论：“让基辅政权去和以色列解决，让以色列去和基辅政权解决” ➡️ 正在采取适当级别的措施来消除图阿普谢无人机袭击造成的后果 ➡️ 普京将召开会议，讨论即将举行的选举的安全安排 ➡️ 如果普京与特朗普进行通话，克里姆林宫将会通报 ➡️ 正在进行密集努力，以防止基辅政权对俄罗斯领土进行打击 ➡️ 关于打击影响地点的任何信息均属机密，不会公开披露 ➡️ 俄罗斯认为马里局势尽快恢复和平与稳定至关重要 ➡️ 5月9日的胜利日阅兵将按计划进行 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 The Chairman of the Foreign Affairs and Defense Committee in the Israeli Knesset, Boaz Bismuth, at the end of the security briefing: The Iranian regime is about to pay a very heavy price. I call on everyone to continue with their routine, be patient, and stay alert. @wfwitness

text: Trump is weighing two paths in dealing with Iran: escalating with military strikes or continuing his “maximum pressure” sanctions to force negotiations. He has at times taken a hard line, telling one adviser, “All [Iran’s leaders] understand is bombs.” But advisers say he remains cautious about actually launching new attacks. As one described it, he is “frustrated but realistic… He doesn’t want to use force. But he’s not backing down.” Source: Axios
text_zh: 特朗普正在权衡处理伊朗问题的两条路径：通过军事打击升级局势，或继续实施“极限施压”制裁以迫使对方进行谈判。他有时采取强硬路线，曾对一位顾问说：“他们（伊朗领导人）只懂炸弹。”但顾问们表示，他在实际发动新袭击方面仍然保持谨慎。正如其中一人所描述的那样，他“感到沮丧但很现实……他不想使用武力。但他也不会退缩。” 来源：Axios

text: Head of the Office of the President of Ukraine, Kyrylo Budanov: We will never renounce our territories. Never recognize occupation. This is our land, we cannot trade it.
text_zh: 乌克兰总统办公室主任，基里洛·布达诺夫：我们永远不会放弃我们的领土。永远不会承认占领。这是我们的土地，我们不能拿它做交易。

text: Head of the Office of the President of Ukraine, Kyrylo Budanov: Nobody in Ukraine would agree to lose even an inch of territory. Nobody wants to deal with the weak — international law doesn’t work here.
text_zh: 乌克兰总统办公室主任，基里洛·布达诺夫：乌克兰没有人会同意失去哪怕一英寸的领土。没有人愿意与弱者打交道——国际法在这里不起作用。

text: — 🇮🇱 / 🇵🇸 Tamir Pardo, former Mossad Chief (2011-2016) during a tour in the West Bank: ‘My mother is a Holocaust survivor, and what I saw here [against Palestinians] reminds me of the persecution against Jews in the previous century’ @Middle_East_Spectator
text_zh: — 🇮🇱 / 🇵🇸 前摩萨德局长（2011-2016）塔米尔·帕尔多在约旦河西岸巡视期间表示：“我的母亲是大屠杀幸存者，我在这里看到的（针对巴勒斯坦人的行为）让我想起了上个世纪对犹太人的迫害” @Middle_East_Spectator

text: ❗️ Hezbullah's attack yesterday with a fixed-wing suicide drone hit an IDF group. An IDF soldier was severely wounded and another was lightly hurt.
text_zh: ❗️ 真主党昨天使用固定翼自杀式无人机袭击了一个以色列国防军小组。一名以色列国防军士兵受重伤，另一名受轻伤。

text: 🇧🇾 🔁 🇵🇱 A "five-for-five" detainee swap is underway along the Belarus-Poland border, the BelTA news agency reported. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇧🇾 🔁 🇵🇱 据白俄罗斯通讯社报道，白俄罗斯与波兰边境正在进行“五换五”的被拘留者交换。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Nuno Felix Barak Ravid being the good stenographer "This is maximum pressure everywhere and from all angles," a senior administration official said. "That could mean military action, too. It might not. It's up to the president." @MarcACaputo, @BarakRavid https://www.axios.com/2026/04/28/iran-war-peace-talks-stalemate - Shalom Lipner tweet
text_zh: 努诺·费利克斯（Nuno Felix）和巴拉克·拉维德（Barak Ravid）作为优秀的速记员，“这是从各个角度施加的最大压力，”一位政府高级官员说。“这也可能意味着军事行动。也可能不是。这取决于总统。” @MarcACaputo, @BarakRavid https://www.axios.com/2026/04/28/iran-war-peace-talks-stalemate - Shalom Lipner 推文

text_zh: 开源情报：对黎巴嫩南部特布宁（Tebnine）的打击。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049078477362516136/video/1 推文

text: WarTranslated Beautiful views in Tuapse. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2049077930827923774/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated：图阿普谢（Tuapse）的美丽景色。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2049077930827923774/video/1 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Axios: The conflict with Iran is increasingly resembling a Cold War-style standoff, marked by sanctions, naval pressure and stalled diplomacy rather than active large-scale fighting. U.S. President Trump and his advisers remain divided over next steps, with some favouring continued economic pressure while others support renewed military action. Several U.S. officials fear getting drawn into a long drawn out frozen conflict. This would be a disaster for the Trump administration with November midterms approaching and energy prices rising due to the conflict. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Axios：与伊朗的冲突越来越像冷战式的对峙，其特点是制裁、海军压力和外交停滞，而不是大规模的积极战斗。美国总统特朗普及其顾问在下一步行动上仍存在分歧，一些人主张继续施加经济压力，而另一些人则支持重启军事行动。几位美国官员担心被卷入一场旷日持久的冻结冲突。随着11月中期选举临近，能源价格因冲突而上涨，这对特朗普政府来说将是一场灾难。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 🇮🇱 Multiple Israeli jets were just heard over Southern Syria. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 🇮🇱 刚刚听到多架以色列喷气式飞机飞越叙利亚南部上空。 @wfwitness

text: Israelis were surrounded and shouted at by locals in Cusco, Peru, who accuse them of being “murderers”, “baby killers” and “war criminals” and tell them to leave.
text_zh: 以色列人在秘鲁库斯科被当地人包围并大声呵斥，当地人指责他们是“杀人犯”、“杀婴者”和“战犯”，并叫他们离开。

text: 🇺🇦 ⚔️ 🇷🇺 Ukraine carried out another drone strike on Russia’s Tuapse oil refinery. The strike hit remaining fuel storage tanks, the facility was already heavily damaged. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 ⚔️ 🇷🇺 乌克兰对俄罗斯图阿普谢炼油厂进行了另一次无人机袭击。袭击击中了剩余的燃料储罐，该设施此前已严重受损。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 Another Israeli airstrike has targeted the town of Brachit, southern Lebanon. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 A third airstrike has targeted the town of Brachit, Southern Lebanon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 另一次以色列空袭袭击了黎巴嫩南部的布拉奇特镇。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 第三次空袭袭击了黎巴嫩南部的布拉奇特镇。@wfwitness

text: Ukraine carried out another drone strike on Russia’s Tuapse oil refinery, marking the third major attack this month. The strike hit remaining fuel storage tanks, causing new explosions and large fires. The facility was already heavily damaged.
text_zh: 乌克兰对俄罗斯图阿普谢炼油厂进行了另一次无人机袭击，这是本月第三次重大袭击。袭击击中了剩余的燃料储罐，引发了新的爆炸和大火。该设施此前已严重受损。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇪🇬 🇵🇸 🇮🇱 i24NEWS: Senior members of U.S. President Trump’s peace team and Hamas representatives are expected to meet in Cairo in the coming days for another round of talks focused on the group’s disarmament. Sources report that progress has been made on Hamas disarmament but a breakthrough is still elusive. Hamas has not formally rejected the latest proposal for a disarmament framework. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇪🇬 🇵🇸 🇮🇱 i24NEWS：预计美国总统特朗普和平团队的高级成员与哈马斯代表将在未来几天在开罗会面，进行新一轮旨在讨论该组织解除武装的会谈。消息人士称，在哈马斯解除武装方面已取得进展，但突破仍难以实现。哈马斯尚未正式拒绝关于解除武装框架的最新提议。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 Footage showcasing the airstrikes that targeted the town of Shaqra, southern Lebanon. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Israeli airstrike again on the town of Shaqra, southern Lebanon. @wfwitness

text: Head of the Office of the President of Ukraine, Kyrylo Budanov: We will never renounce our territories. Never recognize occupation. This is our land, we cannot trade it.
text_zh: 乌克兰总统办公室主任、基里洛·布达诺夫：我们永远不会放弃我们的领土。永远不会承认占领。这是我们的土地，我们不能拿它做交易。

text: Head of the Office of the President of Ukraine, Kyrylo Budanov: Nobody in Ukraine would agree to lose even an inch of territory. Nobody wants to deal with the weak — international law doesn’t work here.

text: Open Source Intel The White House is examining Iran's latest proposal to unblock the Strait of Hormuz. Tehran: Washington is no longer in a position to "dictate" policy to others. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：白宫正在审查伊朗关于解除霍尔木兹海峡封锁的最新提议。德黑兰方面表示：华盛顿已不再有资格对他人“发号施令”。推文
